text: Here, surrounded by relic-like machines and thoughtful wall texts, I sense a hush between the past and present, minds, language, and coded conversation. Everything feels suspended between curiosity and nostalgia. When I turn and glimpse the world dimly lit, a person bright and close by, I am reminded of the communities formed by simply being in these spaces—sharing questions, or even just silence. I feel a little small but connected, witness to both technology's history and humanity's ever-present search for meaning and togetherness.
